asymmetry: UK pension funds are legally permitted to use member contributions as collateral for their own derivative positions, a mechanism that connects individual retirement savings to institutional risk in ways the documentation never describes.

script.intrusion: Your pension manager is legally betting your retirement on derivatives.
script.weight: The average UK defined contribution pension underperforms its benchmark by 1.4% annually. Over a 30-year working life, that is the difference between retiring at 65 and retiring at 72. It compounds in silence.
script.mechanism: Workplace pensions are governed by the Pensions Act 2008. Auto-enrolment was designed to close the retirement savings gap. It did not close the fee gap. The FCA found that a 0.5% annual management charge difference compounds to a 12% reduction in final pot value over 30 years. Most savers do not know what their pension charges. The provider does.
script.proof: The FCA's Value for Money framework, published June 2023, found 16 workplace pension schemes consistently delivering below-benchmark returns over five years. None were closed. All continued accepting new contributions.
script.comment_trigger: Do you know what your pension fund is using as collateral?
script.move: What financially-aware people use to navigate this is Trading 212.

visual_direction.motion: Ken Burns: slow lateral drift left to right, 75 seconds duration

shot_list.intent: Resolution energy. Forward motion. The action the viewer must take.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 3: World: extreme close-up of physical objects — paper fibres, metal grain, ink, fabric weave, glass surface — texture becomes landscape. Camera system: Canon EF 100mm L macro, bellows extension, f/4-f/8, extreme magnification ratio.  Phone in hand. Pension provider's number dialled. The first step being taken — forward motion, camera follows. Optics: 35mm lens, f/2.0, forward motion framing, camera advances with subject. Camera: Steadicam forward tracking following subject, smooth resolute movement, environment opens ahead. Lighting: single raking side light at 10° angle — surface texture revealed as topography. practical desk lamp warm 2800K from below left, harsh shadow on right side, chiaroscuro ratio 5:1. Film stock: Fujichrome Velvia 100 — ultra-saturation, microscopic grain, hyper-sharp, colour density. Atmosphere: warm practical light flickers once at 2 seconds — power-grid suggestion — then stabilises. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] Consistent emotional register and colour temperature throughout. Each shot's aesthetic serves its moment. Temporal energy consistency. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: wide establishing shots, human faces, architecture, depth of field, environmental context.
